summary: Service Wiring Completion & Dashboard Polish Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 15/15 audit_service_wiring tests passed, 11/11 runtime stress tests passed (26 total). All APIs return correct data. Frontend: SystemHealthDashboard fully functional with role-based views (Admin Tenant Scope) and all UI components verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error (Push notification service - not related to current testing scope)

issues: WebSocket shows 'Polling' - expected behavior since WS connection not established in test env

critical_code_review_comments: audit_hook.py: @audited decorator writes audit trails with correct fields (tenant_id, actor_id, operation_name, target_type, severity, duration_ms, timestamp)
response.py: api_response() and from_service_result() provide normalized response envelope
PosFnbService: @audited decorators on create_pos_transaction, adjust_stock, complete_kitchen_order, update_kitchen_order_status
MobileOpsService: @audited decorators on process_no_show, change_room, create_quick_task, create_quick_issue
RmsService: @audited decorators on create_group_booking, create_corporate_contract, create_ota_promotion, record_inventory_usage
FrontdeskService: @audited decorators on checkin, checkout, express_checkin, issue_keycard, deactivate_keycard
SystemHealthDashboard correctly shows role-based views (GMPropertyView, AdminTenantView, SuperadminGlobalView)
ScopeBanner shows correct role label and scope (Admin - Tenant Scope)
WebSocket status badge shows Polling/Live state
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service wiring completed. All services (PosFnbService, MobileOpsService, RmsService, FrontdeskService) have @audited decorators on mutating methods. Runtime stress tests verify concurrent operations on POS transactions, kitchen orders, stock, mobile ops, and WebSocket events. Frontend role-based dashboard shows Admin Tenant View with all components working.

backend_audit_hook: test_audited_writes_audit_entry - writes to audit_logs with correct fields
test_audited_records_failure - records failure status and error_code
test_audited_require_reason_passes_with_reason - passes with reason and stores override_reason
test_audited_does_not_break_on_db_write_failure - audit failure doesn't break service method
backend_api_response: test_api_response_basic - returns status, data, message, last_updated_at
test_api_response_defaults - defaults to ok status, info severity
backend_scope_leakage: test_audit_entry_contains_tenant_id - verifies tenant isolation in audit entries
frontend_system_health: Metric cards: admin-metric-cm, admin-metric-queue, admin-metric-alerts, admin-metric-stuck

mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked. All services query real MongoDB database.
